title: Add humanTree root history buffer matching agentTree's 30-root buffer
description: IdentityRegistry maintains a 30-root history buffer for agentTree (preventing proof staleness during concurrent enrollments) but humanTree has no such buffer — any new human enrollment immediately invalidates in-flight proofs. Add an identical ROOT_HISTORY_SIZE=30 circular buffer for humanTree roots, update verifyHandshake to check humanMerkleRoot against the buffer instead of requiring an exact current-root match. This is a protocol-level parity bug: the IETF draft implies both trees have liveness tolerance but only one does.
